name: In Boise, can I claim if symptoms showed up years after quitting?

mainEntity.name: In Boise, can I claim if symptoms showed up years after quitting?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes, via discovery rule if proven work-related[5].
acceptedAnswer.description: Yes, if you file within the statute from diagnosis and prove cumulative exposure caused it—Idaho workers' comp allows for latent occupational diseases. Discovery rule applies[5]. - Medical causation key for delayed onset. - No recent work doesn't bar if linked. Get retroactive eval, file promptly in Boise.

description: Yes, via discovery rule if proven work-related[5].
